page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1.8xlarge is a memory-optimized virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores on an x86_64 Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at a base clock speed of 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 256.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, relying instead on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core capabilities. Single-core performance is relatively weak, as evidenced by lower-tier scores in stress-ng single-core tests, single-threaded gzip compression, and Geekbench single-core benchmarks. However, the 32 dedicated cores deliver average multi-core performance across stress-ng multi-core, PassMark CPU, and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression tests. Memory bandwidth remains stable in the middle tier, with uncached read speeds of 98.84 GB/sec and write speeds of 48.76 GB/sec.

Given its high memory density relative to processing power, this instance offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound workloads that do not require top-tier single-threaded CPU performance. The 256 GB RAM capacity makes it suitable for hosting medium-sized databases, Redis caching layers, and memory-intensive enterprise applications. It is also capable of handling moderate multi-threaded tasks such as static web serving and small-to-medium language model inference, though it is not optimized for heavy single-core computations or local storage-heavy operations.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance featuring 32 dedicated physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor running at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture and KVM hypervisor, it delivers 256.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high 8.0 GB per core memory-to-CPU ratio. The instance lacks local storage and GPU accelerators, relying on a 6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth. Benchmark data shows weak single-core performance but average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities, including a 98.84 GB/sec uncached read speed. This hardware profile makes the ecs.se1.8xlarge qualitatively cost-effective for memory-intensive workloads rather than compute-heavy tasks. It is best suited for database hosting, Redis caching, static web serving, and moderate multi-threaded applications.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.se1.8xlarge is a memory-optimized instance with 32 Intel Xeon cores, 256 GB RAM, and a 6 Gbps network baseline, delivering average multi-core performance for database and caching workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual server featuring high RAM density and dedicated Intel Xeon cores for database and caching workloads.
